user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Migrate 3-phase PWM motor control to KIT_A2G_TC387_5V_TFT (TC38x) using GTM TOM1 to output three complementary PWM pairs (1/2, 3/4, 5/6) at 20 kHz, center-aligned, 0.5 µs dead-time, 1.0 µs minPulse, initial duties U=25%, V=50%, W=75%, FXCLK0 clock, push-pull, active-high, exact reference pin mapping P00.2..P00.7, and a synchronous per-phase duty update helper.
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: Generate three complementary PWM pairs on TOM1 with hardware-enforced dead-time and minimum pulse, center-aligned at 20 kHz, start at specified phase duties, and provide a function to synchronously latch duty updates at the period boundary.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use the unified IfxGtm_Pwm API for channel configuration and duty/dead-time updates, GTM CMU FXCLK0 as time base, TOM1 TGC shadow transfer for synchronous latching, and IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout to configure TOUT pins with push-pull and the requested pad driver. Complementary behavior and active-high polarity are set per channel. Channel mask and shadow transfer are managed via IfxGtm_Tom_Timer TGC helpers.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Engine recommendation and lock for PWM/TIMER on TC3xx; provides frequency/period base, channel mask and synchronized shadow transfer via TGC.

runtime_function.name: updateGtmTom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Clamp to 1.0 µs minPulse and apply 0.5 µs dead-time, update U/V/W duties on the six TOM1 channels, then trigger TGC shadow transfer to latch all updates synchronously at the period boundary.

driver_changes: Primary control uses IfxGtm_Pwm per mandatory header selection; TOM1 TGC update/latch uses IfxGtm_Tom_Timer helpers for channel mask and applyUpdate.
api_changes: Duty updates are performed with IfxGtm_Pwm_updateChannelDutyImmediate and synchronized via IfxGtm_Tom_Timer_applyUpdate (TGC).
Pins are configured via IfxGtm_PinMap_setTomTout with push-pull and the requested pad driver.
migration_notes.context_preserved: The solution keeps TOM1 center-aligned 20 kHz complementary PWM with 0.5 µs dead-time, 1.0 µs minPulse, initial duties (U=25%, V=50%, W=75%), FXCLK0 clocking, push-pull outputs, active-high polarity, and a synchronous multi-channel duty update helper. Note: The exact reference pin mapping P00.2..P00.7 for TOM1 CH1..CH6 is flagged by the template as invalid/undefined for TC38x LFBGA-516; IfxGtm_PinMap macros for those specific channel-to-pin routes are not available. To fully preserve the physical mapping, verify the board/package variant; otherwise, select the nearest valid TOM1 TOUT mappings for channels 1–6 and keep logical channel pairing (1/2, 3/4, 5/6) unchanged.

PWM.rationale: Driver locked by refiner node (user explicit or engine-scored)
